changeSet.author: mseaton
changeSet.comment: UHM-9341: Backfill obs.order_id on existing testOrderNumber obs written by pre-redesign pihapps. The old specimenCollectionEncounter.gsp wrote testOrderNumber obs without setting obs.order_id, so the new indexed order_id-based fulfiller encounter lookup cannot find those encounters. This sets obs.order_id by matching obs.value_text to orders.order_number, scoped to the testOrderNumber concept (UUID 393dec41-2fb5-428f-acfa-36ea85da6666). Safe to run on sites where no matching obs exist — affects 0 rows.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE obs o INNER JOIN orders ord ON ord.order_number = o.value_text AND ord.voided = 0 SET o.order_id = ord.order_id WHERE o.order_id IS NULL AND o.voided = 0 AND o.value_text IS NOT NULL AND o.concept_id IN (SELECT concept_id FROM concept WHERE uuid = '393dec41-2fb5-428f-acfa-36ea85da6666');
